word: G2558 - κακουχέω - kakouchéō - kak-oo-kheh'-o - Which suffer adversity

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: Which suffer adversity
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From a presumed compound of G2556 and G2192; to maltreat: - which suffer adversity, torment.
